column2: propter quod locūtus sum~; egō autem humiliātus sum nimis. ^ I have believed
column3: therefore have I spoken~; but I have been humbled exceedingly.

column2: «~Omnis homō mendax.~»^ I said in my excess

column3: quae retribuit mihī~? ^ What shall I render to the Lord
column4: for all that he renders unto me~?

column2: et nōmen Dominī invocābō. ^ I will take the chalice of salvation~; and I will call upon the name of the Lord.

column1: 5 ^ Vōta mea Dominō reddem cōram omnī populō ejus. ^ I will pay my vows to the Lord before all his people.
6 ^ Pretiōsa in conspectū Dominī mors sanctōrum ejus. ^ Precious in the sight of the Lord is the death of his saints.

column2: quia egō servus tuus~; egō servus tuus
column3: et fīlius ancillae tuae~; dīrūpistī vincula mea. ^ O Lord
column4: for I am thy servant~; I am thy servant
column5: and the son of thy handmaid~; thou hast broken my bonds.

column2: et nōmen Dominī invocābō. ^ I will sacrifice to thee the sacrifice of praise
column3: and I will call upon the name of the Lord.

column1: 9 ^ Vōta mea Dominō reddem in conspectū omnis populī ejus
column2: ^ I will pay my vows to the Lord in the sight of all his people
in mediō tuī Jerozolimā. ^ In the courts of the house of the Lord
